title: CIP-309 supersedes reference
description: A reference to a prior PoE transaction this record supersedes: the 32-byte Cardano transaction hash of the earlier record. Modelled as a 64-character lowercase-hex JSON string (CBOR `bstr` of 32 bytes). A wrong length is reported as SUPERSEDES_TX_INVALID_LENGTH. STRUCTURAL only: whether the referenced transaction exists or is itself a valid CIP-309 record is a chain-resolution concern of the public/recipient verifier, not the structural validator.
